# Orbit feedback components

Full API for the **Feedback** category. Import from `@efficio/orbit`. Token values are
in the orbit-tokens skill; accessibility contracts in orbit-a11y.

## Alert
- **File:** `packages/orbit/src/feedback/Alert.tsx`
- **Description:** Renders a multiline status alert with icon, title, optional description, and dismiss action.
- **Props:**
| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `description` | `string` | No | — | — |
| `onDismiss` | `() => void` | No | — | — |
| `title` | `string` | Yes | — | — |
| `type` | `'Information' \| 'Success' \| 'Error' \| 'Warning' \| 'No Status'` | Yes | — | — |
- **Variants:**
- `type`: `Information`, `Success`, `Error`, `Warning`, `No Status`
- **Tokens consumed:**
  - colour: `--orbit-color-dark-grey`, `--orbit-color-status-low-bg-error`, `--orbit-color-status-low-bg-information`, `--orbit-color-status-low-bg-no-status`, `--orbit-color-status-low-bg-success`, `--orbit-color-status-low-bg-warning`, `--orbit-color-status-low-fg-error`, `--orbit-color-status-low-fg-information`, `--orbit-color-status-low-fg-no-status`, `--orbit-color-status-low-fg-success`, `--orbit-color-status-low-fg-warning`, `--orbit-color-status-low-icon-error`, `--orbit-color-status-low-icon-information`, `--orbit-color-status-low-icon-no-status`, `--orbit-color-status-low-icon-success`, `--orbit-color-status-low-icon-warning`
- **Composes:** `FaIcon`

## InlineBanner
- **File:** `packages/orbit/src/feedback/InlineBanner.tsx`
- **Description:** Renders a compact single-line feedback banner with semantic tone and optional dismiss action.

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `contrast` | `'High' \| 'Low'` | No | `'High'` | — |

| `label` | `string` | Yes | — | — |
| `status` | `string` | No | — | — |
| `variant` | `'Disabled' \| 'Information' \| 'Success' \| 'Error' \| 'Warning' \| 'No Status' \| 'Style 1' \| 'None'` | Yes | — | — |
- **Variants:**
- `contrast`: `High`, `Low`
- `variant`: `Disabled`, `Information`, `Success`, `Error`, `Warning`, `No Status`, `Style 1`, `None`
